{{CargoRelic
|name=The Age of Bronze
|class_id=22659
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|birthday=09-01
|source=
|description=On Sept 1, 1876 AD, Rodin completed The Age of Bronze.<br>Inspired by Michelangelo's sculptures, Rodin created this masterpiece, using a young soldier as his model. However, when critics doubted its authenticity, Rodin amazed them by presenting a nude male sculpture on the spot. This bold move solidified his reputation as a revered master sculptor.
|fame=54
|art=106
|fth=66
|civ=74
|tech=62
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Demon Minion HP +3%<br>Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +12<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Demon Minion HP +4%<br>Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +16<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Demon Minion HP +5%<br>Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +20<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Demon Minion HP +7%<br>Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +28<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Demon Minion HP +9%<br>Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +36<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Demon Minion HP +12%<br>Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +48<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Demon Minion HP +12%<br>Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +48<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail DEF +600
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +600
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail RUSH +600
|mirage={{Mirage|name=New Era|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Fluorite, +5|orange}}
|3name=The Age of Iron|3rec=114.56M|3atk=346750|3defense=205080|3hp=34174209|3weak=43027
|4name=The Age of Silver|4rec=131.04M|4atk=382216|4defense=228261|4hp=45315875|4weak=46679
|5name=The Age of Gold|5rec=153.03M|5atk=431747|5defense=259194|5hp=62825389|5weak=50864
|6name=The Age of Diamond|6rec=183.57M|6atk=497524|6defense=302171|6hp=95038694|6weak=55538
|Arec=226.40M|Aatk=588229|Adefense=362429|Ahp=146730431|Aweak=60698
}}}}
